skills.title: Calculate Hash
skills.description: Calculate the hash of a given text.

skills.title: Interactive Map
skills.description: Show an interactive map view for a given location.

skills.title: Query Wikipedia
skills.description: Query a summary from Wikipedia for a given topic.

skills.title: QR Code Generator
skills.description: Generates a QR code for a given URL.

skills.title: Text Spinner
skills.description: Spin text visually inside the app.

skills.title: Mood Tracker
skills.description: Log and track your daily mood with history stored on-device.

skills.title: Send Email
skills.description: Compose and send an email via the device's email app.

skills.title: Kitchen Adventure
skills.description: A text adventure where everyone is a sentient kitchen appliance.

skills.title: Unit Converter
skills.description: Converts between common units: length, weight, temperature, speed, and volume.

skills.title: Timezone Converter
skills.description: Converts times between time zones worldwide.

skills.title: To-Do List
skills.description: Persistent to-do list stored on-device. Add, complete, and delete tasks.

skills.title: Breathing Exercise
skills.description: Animated breathing exercises for relaxation: box, 4-7-8, and calm breathing.

skills.title: Countdown Timer
skills.description: Visual countdown timer for cooking, exercise, meetings, and more.

skills.title: Water Tracker
skills.description: Track daily water intake with goal progress stored on-device.

skills.title: Sleep Log
skills.description: Log bedtime and wake time. View sleep history and average duration on-device.

skills.title: Loan Calculator
skills.description: Calculate monthly payments, total cost, and interest for loans and mortgages.

skills.title: Expense Log
skills.description: Track personal expenses by category. View spending summaries on-device.

skills.title: Shopping List
skills.description: Persistent shopping list on-device. Add items, check them off, clear bought items.

skills.title: Recipe Generator
skills.description: Suggests recipes based on ingredients you have available.

skills.title: Rhyme Generator
skills.description: Helps write rhymes, poems, lyrics, and rap verses.

skills.title: Travel Planner
skills.description: Creates day-by-day travel itineraries for any destination and duration.

skills.title: Polite Rewriter
skills.description: Rewrites messages in a more professional or polite tone.

skills.title: Birthday Greeting
skills.description: Generates personalized birthday messages, wishes, and card texts.

skills.title: Mood Music
skills.description: Suggests or plays music based on your mood using the Loudly API.

skills.title: Restaurant Roulette
skills.description: Randomly select a restaurant based on location and cuisine preference.

skills.title: Virtual Piano
skills.description: Play a virtual piano keyboard inside the app.

skills.title: Dictionary
skills.description: Look up definitions, pronunciation, synonyms, and example sentences (free API, no key needed).

skills.title: Currency Converter
skills.description: Convert between currencies using real-time exchange rates (free API, no key needed).

skills.title: Book Finder
skills.description: Find and recommend books by title, author, or genre using Open Library (free API, no key needed).
